title: Launcher fails fast in non-TTY stdin
description: src/launcher.ts:649 hangs forever in non-TTY stdin (piped invocation, CI). Hard to detect; only manifests when sweech is scripted.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 1: "launcher.ts:649 hangs in non-TTY stdin (e.g. piped invocation, CI)"

acceptanceCriteria: If process.stdin.isTTY is false at launcher entry, print clear error to stderr and exit non-zero
Error names the alternative: "use sweech list for non-interactive listings"
sweech invoked in a real terminal still works exactly as before
